tasks.label: Build hledger-web
args: command -v stack >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Error: Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install' && exit 1); stack install hledger-web
where stack >nul 2>&1 || (echo Error: Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install && exit /b 1) && stack install hledger-web
command -v stack >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Error: Stack is not installed. Please install it from https://docs.haskellstack.org/en/stable/README/#how-to-install' && exit 1); stack install hledger-web
